S.FORM: Alexis Ajinça hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, pkaki' kkska'. kawas tay 1988, ryax sa tay 6 nqu tay 5, Alexis Ajinça, squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya Alexis Ajinça maki msqun ki Courtney, maki 2 la'iy, Carter, Caysen. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: alexis~ɕ ajin*a ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, pkakiʔ kks~ɕkaʔ. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, alexis~ɕ ajin*a, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. qnxan nja alexis~ɕ ajin*a maki ms~ɕqun ki ʦ~ʨourtnej, maki * laʔij, ʦ~ʨarter, ʦ~ʨajs~ɕen. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: Alexis Ajinça hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, pkaki' kkska'. kawas tay 1988, ryax sa tay 6 nqu tay 5, Alexis Ajinça, squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya Alexis Ajinça maki msqun ki Courtney, maki 2 la'iy, Carter, Caysen. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: alexis~ɕ ajin*a ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, pkakiʔ kks~ɕkaʔ. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, alexis~ɕ ajin*a, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. qnxan nja alexis~ɕ ajin*a maki ms~ɕqun ki ʦ~ʨourtnej, maki * laʔij, ʦ~ʨarter, ʦ~ʨajs~ɕen. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
